description: Don't auto expand the quick add view in list view
summary:
Task KB-656 is complete. The autoExpand prop was already fully implemented in QuickEntryBox.tsx with:
- Optional autoExpand?: boolean prop (defaults to true for backward compatibility)
- handleFocus callback checks autoExpand before expanding
- ListView.tsx passes autoExpand={false} to disable auto-expand in list view
- Column.tsx uses default behavior (continues to auto-expand)
- All 60 QuickEntryBox tests pass including the test for autoExpand={false}
- Added changeset file for the dashboard package patch

log.outcome: The specification is well-crafted and technically accurate. It correctly identifies the minimal change needed—adding an `autoExpand` prop to QuickEntryBox with default `true` for backward compatibility, passing `autoExpand={false}` in ListView, and leaving Column.tsx unchanged. File references, function names, and testing requirements are all correct.
